explanation: The Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS) is a government initiative by DPIIT that provides seed funding of up to 50 lakhs to early-stage startups through a network of approved incubators. If your startup is DPIIT-recognized and at the idea, prototype, or early-stage phase, you can apply through any of the 100+ approved incubators across India. The application involves submitting your business plan, pitch deck, and identity proof. Deadlines vary by incubator.
